mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document (name, folder_id, content, creator_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{folderId},#{content} ,#{creatorId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM document WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT doc.* FROM ( SELECT document_id FROM permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND permission_type IN ('editor', 'viewer') ) AS perm INNER JOIN document doc ON perm.document_id = doc.id WHERE doc.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY doc.update_time DESC;
mapper.update:
UPDATE document
name = #{name}, content = #{content}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
